description: Test data for AI Lead Qualification & CRM Entry workflow
workflow_name: AI Lead Qualification & CRM Entry — Property Management

test_cases.name: Hot Lead - Sarah Chen
test_cases.description: High-value prospect with 28 units, strong budget, urgent timeline. Expected score: 8-10

payload.primary_need: AI-powered tenant screening and lease management automation
payload.current_pain: Manually reviewing 50+ applications per month. Losing good tenants to faster landlords.

test_cases.curl_command:
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/new-lead \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "first_name": "Sarah",
    "last_name": "Chen",
    "email": "jtsomwaru+sarah.chen@gmail.com",
    "phone": "212-555-0147",
    "company": "Chen Property Group",
    "portfolio_size": 28,
    "monthly_budget": 4500,
    "primary_need": "AI-powered tenant screening and lease management automation",
    "timeline": "Ready to start within 2 weeks",
    "current_pain": "Manually reviewing 50+ applications per month. Losing good tenants to faster landlords.",
    "property_type": "Residential multifamily",
    "location": "Brooklyn, NY",
    "heard_about_us": "LinkedIn post"
  }'

expected_output.scoring_rationale: Strong budget ($4,500/mo exceeds $2,000 threshold), large portfolio (28 units exceeds 10-unit target), high urgency (2-week timeline), perfect service match (AI tenant screening + lease automation), clear decision-maker signals (company name, specific pain points about losing tenants)

test_cases.name: Warm Lead - Marcus Reeves
test_cases.description: Mid-range prospect with 9 units, moderate budget, exploring options. Expected score: 5-7

payload.primary_need: Maintenance request tracking and vendor coordination
payload.current_pain: Spreadsheets are getting unmanageable with 9 units.

test_cases.curl_command:
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/new-lead \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "first_name": "Marcus",
    "last_name": "Reeves",
    "email": "jtsomwaru+marcus.reeves@gmail.com",
    "phone": "718-555-0203",
    "company": "Reeves Holdings LLC",
    "portfolio_size": 9,
    "monthly_budget": 1800,
    "primary_need": "Maintenance request tracking and vendor coordination",
    "timeline": "Exploring options for Q2",
    "current_pain": "Spreadsheets are getting unmanageable with 9 units.",
    "property_type": "Mixed residential/commercial",
    "location": "Queens, NY",
    "heard_about_us": "Google search"
  }'

expected_output.scoring_rationale: Moderate budget ($1,800/mo just below $2,000 threshold), portfolio slightly under target (9 units vs 10), medium urgency (Q2 timeline), moderate service match (maintenance tracking is secondary offering), has company name but pain point less specific

test_cases.name: Cold Lead - Tom Nguyen
test_cases.description: Low-value prospect with 2 units, low budget, just curious. Expected score: 1-4

payload.current_pain: Managing my 2 units myself, wondering if AI can help.

test_cases.curl_command:
curl -X POST http://localhost:5678/webhook/new-lead \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "first_name": "Tom",
    "last_name": "Nguyen",
    "email": "jtsomwaru+tom.nguyen@gmail.com",
    "phone": "347-555-0088",
    "company": "Self-managed",
    "portfolio_size": 2,
    "monthly_budget": 500,
    "primary_need": "Just curious about AI tools",
    "timeline": "No specific timeline",
    "current_pain": "Managing my 2 units myself, wondering if AI can help.",
    "property_type": "Residential",
    "location": "Bronx, NY",
    "heard_about_us": "Friend referral"
  }'

expected_output.scoring_rationale: Weak budget ($500/mo well below threshold), very small portfolio (2 units), no urgency (no timeline), vague service interest (just curious), no clear decision-maker signals (self-managed, no specific pain)

service_match.high: AI automation, tenant screening, lease ops (0-2 points)

decision_maker_signals.present: Company name + specific pain points (0-1 point)

validation_notes: Hot leads (score >= 7) trigger: HubSpot contact creation, personalized email, Slack alert, Sheets logging
Warm/Cold leads (score < 7) trigger: Nurture email, Sheets logging only
All test emails use jtsomwaru+[name]@gmail.com format for easy tracking
Slack alerts go to the configured webhook for real-time notification
Google Sheets logging uses 'Lead Log' tab with standardized columns
